description: Ground truth for full-session extraction validation — session-import turns 1-345. Derived from docs/design-synthesis-layer.md §1.2-§1.6.

expected_independent_characters.name: Lyrawyn
expected_independent_characters.notes: Born turn-071; named explicitly; appears 50+ turns; has kinship to PC and Kael

expected_independent_characters.name: Faelan
expected_independent_characters.notes: Born turn-183; PC's second child; arcane power catalyst

expected_independent_characters.name: Rune
expected_independent_characters.notes: Born turn-306; miniature snowflake in eyes; arcane alignment

expected_independent_characters.name: Kael
expected_independent_characters.notes: Major NPC present in 16+ events; appears from turn-009 as unnamed captor through turn-343 as tribal leader. Pre-naming descriptions should merge into char-kael, not remain as separate entities.

expected_independent_characters.name: The Elder
expected_independent_characters.notes: Authority figure from turn-015 through turn-340 (winter council). Grizzled man with eyes like chips of flint.

expected_independent_characters.name: The Shaman
expected_independent_characters.notes: Distinct from The Healer. Appears turn-059+, has earthy magic, performs rituals. Active through turn-340.

expected_independent_characters.name: Anya
expected_independent_characters.notes: Trained by PC in subtle energy sensing. Active in plague crisis and disruption field experiments.

expected_independent_characters.name: Lena
expected_independent_characters.notes: Recruited as co-teacher turn-157. Later formally delegated as learning leader turn-301.

expected_independent_characters.name: Tala
expected_independent_characters.notes: Mead-making apprentice. Present at winter council turn-339.

expected_independent_characters.name: Borin
expected_independent_characters.notes: Kiln apprentice turn-178. Mentioned in 16+ turns. Accepts Faelan's tutelage turn-324.

expected_independent_characters.name: The Healer
expected_independent_characters.notes: Active in plague crisis. Distinct role from shaman — healer for recognition, shaman for rites.

expected_independent_characters.name: Gorok
expected_independent_characters.notes: Warrior-Chief Gorok. Arrives at settlement turn-314. Paired with Maelis as dual forces turn-343.

expected_independent_characters.name: Chief Thorne
expected_independent_characters.notes: Leader of the Ironwood Clan. Accepts food and sends trackers turn-316.

expected_independent_characters.name: Elder Lyra
expected_independent_characters.notes: CRITICAL DISAMBIGUATION: Elder Lyra (Riverfolk elder, turn-314+) vs Lyrawyn (PC's daughter, turn-071+). Two different people.

expected_independent_characters.name: Maelis
expected_independent_characters.notes: Maelis of the Swift Arrows. Riverfolk hunter-scout. Arrives turn-332.

expected_independent_characters.name: Rurik
expected_independent_characters.notes: Accompanies PC on eastern expedition. Mentioned in turns 195, 202, 257+.

must_not_merge.reason: Lyrawyn is PC's daughter, not an alias
Faelan is PC's son, not an alias
Thorne is Ironwood Clan leader, not PC
Shaman is a distinct tribal NPC
Elder Lyra (Riverfolk) is different from Lyrawyn (PC's daughter)

coreference_groups.notes: Kael is first seen as unnamed captor (turn-009) and later named (turn-149). All pre-naming descriptions refer to the same person.

entity_staleness_targets.reason: Elder active through turn-340 winter council
